run_summary.summary: Big day in the pipeline! Liz signed the SOJOS contract this morning and is starting content early next week — first draft deadline is Apr 23 (Kenny negotiated this explicitly). Aqara Cameras reel is confirmed live — brand reached out to verify and Liz shared the link, so it's ready to invoice. BHG x Walmart products are arriving — first delivery today, 3 more on Saturday, so all outdoor dining set items should be in hand by the weekend. New inbound: Goldfish Swim School paid family/parenting campaign through CreatorOpportunity — 3-5 day decision window, so needs a look today or tomorrow.

suggestions.message: Kenny negotiated a hard first draft deadline of Apr 23 with Ruby — that's Thursday! Liz confirmed she'll start early next week. 🎬
Reel is live and brand confirmed it Apr 16 — time to send that invoice! 💸
First delivery arrived today, 3 more coming Saturday Apr 19. All products in hand by the weekend — great time to schedule the outdoor dining shoot! 🛋️
National swim school franchise with a paid family/parenting campaign — fits Liz's niche. Decision window is 3-5 days from today, so needs a look ASAP. 🏊

deals.next_action: Film first video draft for SOJOS Sunglasses (due Apr 23)
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Liz signed the contract and returned it to Ruby. Kenny negotiated: first draft due Apr 23, second video planned for May. Sunglasses already received. Deal is 2 videos total.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Liz signed SOJOS contract — moved to Content. First draft deadline Apr 23, second video in May.

deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Reel confirmed live — https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXDLWFnjWeI/. Brand manager (misslizdidit@socialmediacollabs.com) asked if it went live; Liz confirmed and shared the link. Brand approved content on Apr 9 and requested collaborator tag.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Reel confirmed posted and brand notified — moved to Delivered. Ready to invoice.

deals.next_action: Film outdoor dining content — all products in hand by Apr 19
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Gretta confirmed first delivery arriving today (Apr 17), 3 more on Saturday Apr 19. Table requires someone home to receive. Tracking details to follow tomorrow morning.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Product deliveries underway — first batch today, remainder Sat Apr 19. Ready to film by next week.

deals.next_action: Decide whether to submit interest via Creator Opportunity platform
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Inbound paid campaign via creatoropportunity.com — 'Let's Talk Parenting, Safety & Swim' with Goldfish Swim School (national franchise). Deliverables: 1 IG Post/Reel OR TikTok OR YouTube + 1-year content licensing. Rate TBD — can propose own terms via platform form. Looking to review options in next 3-5 days. Note: bulk platform outreach (landed in Promotions), not a personal pitch.
